stories.summary: Default invocation produces 16-char password with all character sets
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 passgen.py
J[X1S2c%lJ44Izbn
# Output: 16-character password with mixed chars (default behavior correct)
```

stories.summary: --length and --count flags work correctly, including large counts
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 passgen.py --length 8 --count 5
sakL3"6(
aMJ,2d%0
51Y4F}pa
g=7%%R=c
0,[=ughW
# 5 passwords, each 8 chars — correct

$ python3 passgen.py --count 100 --length 8 --no-symbols | wc -l
100
```

stories.summary: All --no-* flags correctly exclude their character sets; --no-ambiguous removes 0O1lI
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 passgen.py --no-uppercase --no-lowercase --no-symbols --length 100
# Output contains only digits (verified: grep '[^0-9]' | wc -l = 0)

$ python3 passgen.py --no-uppercase --length 200
# No uppercase letters present (verified via test suite)

$ python3 passgen.py --no-ambiguous --length 1000
# Zero occurrences of 0,O,1,l,I (verified: grep '[0O1lI]' = 0 bytes)
```

stories.summary: --copy copies last password to clipboard; works with --count
stories.evidence:
```
$ pw=$(python3 passgen.py --length 20 --no-symbols --copy); clip=$(pbpaste); [ "$pw" = "$clip" ] && echo "MATCH"
MATCH

$ python3 passgen.py --length 12 --count 3 --no-symbols --copy
DWxbb7O5GX7U
GQyRUctV5gQw
HVDfrJ310Pu7
$ pbpaste
HVDfrJ310Pu7
# Last password correctly copied to clipboard
```

stories.summary: Length 1 works; invalid inputs (negative length, zero count, no charsets) error with code 2
stories.evidence:
```
$ python3 passgen.py --length 1
]
# Length 1: works

$ python3 passgen.py --length -1
passgen.py: error: Length must be at least 1
# Exit code 2: correct

$ python3 passgen.py --no-uppercase --no-lowercase --no-digits --no-symbols
passgen.py: error: At least one character set must be enabled
# Exit code 2: correct

$ python3 passgen.py --help
# All flags documented correctly
```

```
$ python3 passgen.py --count 10 --length 32
# 10 passwords generated, all unique (verified in test suite: set(lines) == 10)
```

```
$ python3 -m pytest test_passgen.py -v
25 passed in 0.07s
# All 25 unit tests pass
```
